notes: HAR-408 captures Admin GraphQL 2026-04 inventory quantity mutation contract drift. The live fixture records InventoryChangeInput/InventorySetQuantityInput schema fields, missing @idempotent behavior for inventoryAdjustQuantities and inventorySetQuantities, changeFromQuantity-required validation for adjust/set quantity inputs, legacy ignoreCompareQuantity rejection, and successful changeFromQuantity set/adjust writes against a disposable product. The parity runner strictly replays the missing changeFromQuantity set branch through a 2026-04 proxy request, and committed runtime tests replay the remaining fixture-backed branches through /admin/api/2026-04/graphql.json without runtime Shopify writes.
